reviews.text: Sophie was the BEST decision we made for our wedding. I am not a naturally photogenic person and Sophie made me feel beautiful in my photos! She truly captures the essence of the moment. Nothing feels staged or awkward. She is so easy to work with, kind, and makes sure you get all the shots on your list. The best photographer!!

Sophie is the BEST!!!! My wife and I reached out to her to shoot our wedding in Detroit, and we wouldn’t have wanted to work with anyone else. She was extremely helpful in the planning phase, meeting with us multiple times to make sure we were getting exactly what we wanted (for both our wedding day and rehearsal dinner!). Throughout the wedding day chaos, she was extremely organized and made sure we were on schedule with all of our photos, as we were on a very tight timeline. She made everything go so smoothly, capturing amazing posed photos as well as perfect candid photos of all of the day’s biggest moments! Sophie was also super flexible throughout the entire process, always catering to what we wanted but also giving us direction as needed. She was quick to adapt and think on her feet when things didn’t go according to plan - during our wedding party photos, our ideal location was unavailable when we got there. Sophie quickly found a similar spot that was exactly what we wanted, and the pictures couldn’t have turned out any better! The photos speak for themselves - amazing quality that perfectly captured every moment of the best day ever. We recommend her to anyone for any and all photo-worthy occasions!

Sophie did an amazing job on our maternity photos this past December! From the very beginning, she was incredibly communicative and genuinely invested in getting to know us and our vision. She even helped me choose my outfit and the location, which made the whole process feel seamless.

During the photoshoot, she made us feel so comfortable, like we were meeting up with an old friend, and fully embraced the fact that we wanted to capture this special time in our lives with our two dogs. We received so many adorable photos of our family of four that we’ll cherish forever.

Sophie made the entire experience easy, relaxed, and carefree. I was completely on the fence about doing a maternity shoot, but I’m very grateful I found Sophie and decided to go for it!

Sophie is the BEST photographer around! Several of my family & friends have had Sophie as their wedding photographer & she truly has become a friend. She provided us with a detailed elopement guide & helped us develop the timeline for the whole wedding day. From her organization skills to sweet & creative personality she is a wonderful person & amazing photographer! Our photos from the wedding day in the RMNP are stunning!!! My husband & I are awkward in front of the camera & she made us look like naturals.

I wholeheartedly recommend Sophie to anyone who is looking for an attentive, talented and friendly photographer. She was the only vendor who I was 10000% certain that I needed on my wedding day - I love her editing style, composition and overall aesthetic. Sophie is a true professional: delivers quality work, is transparent on pricing, incredibly reliable and knowledgeable. She worked with me to understand everything that I wanted to capture on my wedding day and executed on everything I asked for. If you have the honor of working with Sophie one day, you absolutely will not be let down.
